Now I have a clear picture. The user has a `PriceCalculator` class and wants modern data-driven MSTest tests. The legacy tests show anti-patterns. I'll create proper data-driven tests using MSTest's `[DataRow]` attribute (and possibly `[DynamicData]`) following modern MSTest best practices.
